stem: Under which provision of the Securities and Futures Act is the Code on Collective Investment Schemes issued by MAS?
explanation: 教材 1.1 指出守则由 MAS 依 SFA(2001)第 321 条发出。第 286/287 条涉及撤销/暂停计划授权或认可,第 289 条涉及受托人/托管人批准——均非守则的发出依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s1.1 (SFA s321)

stem: On what date did the revised Code on Collective Investment Schemes come into effect?
explanation: 教材 2.1 明确修订版守则于 2011 年 10 月 1 日生效。A 是守则首次发出之日,C 是最近一次修订之日,D 为干扰项。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s2.1

stem: Which statement about the legal nature of the Code is correct?

options.A: The Code is non-statutory, but a failure to comply may be relied upon in civil or criminal proceedings
options.B: A failure to comply automatically renders a person liable to criminal proceedings
options.C: The Code overrides the SFA where they conflict
options.D: The Code applies only to foreign-recognised schemes

explanation: 教材 1.2 指出守则属非法定性质,违反本身不致使人承担刑责,但可在民事或刑事诉讼中被任一方援引以证立或否定相关责任。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s1.2

stem: A trustee may NOT be considered independent of the manager if a single person has an interest in at least what percentage of the shares of BOTH the trustee and the manager (or its related corporations)?
explanation: 教材第 3 节 Guidance 指出,若任何人持有受托人 20% 或以上股份并同时持有管理人或其相关法团 20% 或以上股份,则受托人不视为独立。同一 20% 测试也适用于 VCC 托管人。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s3 Conditions for Appointment (Guidance)

stem: Within how many business days should a trustee inform the Authority of a breach of section 289(3) of the SFA?
explanation: 教材第 3 节 Operational Obligations(a)规定受托人应在察觉违反 SFA 第 289(3) 条后三个营业日内通知 MAS。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s3C Operational Obligations

stem: Under the Code, within what timeframe should the manager pay out redemption proceeds to participants of an ordinary (non-hedge, non-property) authorised scheme?
explanation: 教材第 4 节 Operational Obligations(a)规定一般计划赎回款应在 T+7 营业日内支付。90 天适用于对冲基金,物业基金另依附录 6。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s4B (ch.3.2(a))

stem: How frequently, at most, may a scheme's performance fee crystallise under the Code?

options.A: No more frequently than once a month
options.B: No more frequently than once a quarter
options.C: There is no limit on crystallisation frequency
options.D: No more frequently than once a year

explanation: 教材第 4F 节(ch.3.6(a)(iii))规定业绩费的结晶频率不得超过每年一次。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s4F Performance Fees

stem: Where a performance fee is calculated on a fulcrum-fee basis, the fulcrum fee should be limited to what range relative to the base fee?

options.A: Between zero and 100% of the base fee
options.B: Between zero and 150% of the base fee
options.C: Between zero and 200% of the base fee
options.D: Between 50% and 200% of the base fee

explanation: 教材第 4F 节(ch.3.6(a)(v))规定支点费应随业绩相对基准对称浮动,限于基础费的 0% 至 200%。例如基础费 1.5%,支点费区间为 0~3.0%。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s4F (ch.3.6(a)(v))

stem: Which of the following terms is expressly PROHIBITED in a scheme's name and description?
explanation: 教材第 5A 节(d)明确禁止在名称及描述中使用"capital protected"与"principal protected"。"capital guaranteed"在符合附录 4 时可用,"fund-of-funds"与"index"在符合相应指引时亦可用。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s5A Name of Scheme

stem: Which activity is a scheme NOT prohibited from carrying out under the Code?

options.D: Short selling arising from financial derivatives invested per Appendix 1 sections 4 and 5

explanation: 教材第 5B 节列明禁止直接放贷、提供担保、承销及卖空,但卖空在源自依附录 1 第 4、5 节投资的金融衍生品时属例外、可被允许。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s5B Prohibited Activities

stem: A manager may suspend dealings in units of a scheme. Within what period should the suspension cease, absent any extension?
explanation: 教材第 7B 节(c)规定暂停应在例外情形消失后尽快结束,且无论如何应在暂停开始后 21 天内结束;延长须经受托人每周复核。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s7B Suspension of Dealings

stem: A valuation error triggers a requirement for the manager to compensate affected participants and the scheme when the error represents at least what proportion of the scheme's NAV per unit (after adjustment)?
explanation: 教材第 7E 节(b)规定当估值错误达 NAV 每单位 0.5% 或以上时,管理人须补偿受影响参与者及计划;但若单一参与者应得补偿不超过 $20,则可免补偿该参与者(对计划的补偿仍适用)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — s7E Valuation Errors and Compensation

stem: Under Appendix 1, aggregate investments in or exposures to a single entity's transferable securities or money market instruments should not exceed what percentage of the scheme's NAV (the single-entity limit)?
explanation: 教材附录 1 第 2.1(a)规定单一实体限额为 NAV 的 10%。20% 为集团限额;5% 为未评级/非投资级公司债的下调限额;35% 为满足评级条件的政府/公共债务上调上限。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Appendix 1 s2.1(a)

stem: The global exposure of a scheme to financial derivatives or embedded derivatives should not exceed what proportion of the scheme's NAV at all times?
explanation: 教材附录 1 第 3.1 规定衍生品(含嵌入式衍生品)的全球敞口任何时候不得超过 NAV 的 100%,按承诺法或经咨询 MAS 后的 VaR 法计算。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Appendix 1 s3.1

stem: Under Appendix 3, what is the minimum initial subscription per participant for a single hedge fund and for a fund-of-hedge-funds (FOHF) respectively?
explanation: 教材附录 3 第 4.1 规定单一对冲基金最低初始认购为每名参与者 S$100,000;第 5.1 规定 FOHF 为 S$20,000。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Appendix 3 s4.1, s5.1

stem: Under Appendix 4, an eligible guarantor of a capital guaranteed fund that is a financial institution must have a minimum long-term rating of at least:

options.A: BBB by Fitch, Baa by Moody's or BBB by S&P
options.B: A by Fitch, A by Moody's or A by S&P
options.C: AA by Fitch, Aa by Moody's or AA by S&P
options.D: AAA by Fitch, Aaa by Moody's or AAA by S&P

explanation: 教材附录 4 第 3.2(a)规定金融机构担保人须至少 AA/Aa/AA 评级;第 3.2(b)规定其他情形须至少 AAA/Aaa/AAA。A 评级仅是评级下跌时的容忍下限(3.3),并非合资格担保人的最低门槛。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Appendix 4 s3.2
